middleware.description: Attaches a request-correlation-id to any TaxCalculationRequested event fired during the request. Ensures every calculation write emits an audit event tagged with the originating request (compliance CC7.2 traceability). Runs on tenant-plane routes that write calculations (POST /calculate + downstream invoice-line create paths).

consumed.note: Applied per-route with the specific entitlement key (tax_capture for base surface, tax_jurisdiction_custom for custom-jurisdiction create, tax_annual_report for /reports/annual, tax_advanced_providers on advanced provider routes, tax_multi_currency on cross-currency calculations, tax_exemption_management on exemption CRUD routes).
The permission-based authorize middleware wraps the ability checks defined in policies.json + permissions.json. Route-level `permission` metadata resolves through this middleware.
Runs on every write route to enrich the audit trail with the caller's user_id + user_agent + ip. Marketing + tax + observability all consume this.
